name: draft-message
description: Draft professional messages — emails, Slack messages, announcements, or any written communication. Use when the user asks to write a message, draft an email, compose a reply, announce something, or needs help with professional communication tone.
author: pantheon

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Message type: email, slack, announcement, or general

parameters.name: tone
parameters.description: Tone: formal, professional, casual, or friendly
